impl: tinygrad-native UOp schedule (model.py ~301, Q4K_GEMV_WARP / _DOWN env-gated, default-off, lossless)
schedule_shape: work-decomposition warp over the Q4_K GEMV: split the in_features reduction across a warp of lanes, partial-sum then reduce; native renderer lowers it (NOT a hand kernel)
row_wave_decomposition: per-output-row work split across lanes; K-block = 256-element Q4_K superblock granularity ((in_features//256)%4==0 guard)
reduction_primitive: tinygrad-native reduce (LDS tree-reduce per the native-codegen experiment; NOT cross-lane ds_bpermute, NOT fused v_dot2)
expected_flags: native AMDGPU schedule; emits LDS reductions; does NOT emit v_dot2 or ds_bpermute (renderer gap)
wd_contexts: decode ctx 512-4096; at/below llama MMVQ (weight-GEMV parity) per the time-tax diff
vs_llama_mmvq: llama MMVQ uses int-dot (integer dot-product) per-warp; tinygrad warp schedule reaches parity via native float reduce; differs in dtype path (no integer MMVQ primitive)
must_not_regress: weight-GEMV at/below llama; lossless byte-identical; the parity that frees the attention/materialization gap to dominate
